# SnapExplaiN AI

Point. Snap. Understand.

SnapExplaiN AI is an advanced AI visual explainer. Users can upload any image, and our system automatically identifies the object/document and provides highly tailored, deep contextual insights.

## Core API Endpoint

`POST /api/describe`
- Accept: application/json
- Payload: `{"base64Url": "data:image/png;base64,..."}`
- Response: `{"result": "Analysis text", "generatedAt": "2026-07-20T..."}`

## Supported Use Cases

- Government documents (ID checks, bills)
- Medical prescriptions and health labels
- Food nutrition/ingredient labels
- Vehicle dashboard warning light identifiers
- Homework & diagrams
- Plants & electronic components

https://snap-explain-ai.vercel.app/
